name: Lime Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Thai chile, dried and crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Brown chicken thighs until golden brown on all sides.
3. Add onion, garlic, Thai chile, cumin, coriander, turmeric, and soy sauce to the pan.
4. Stir to combine and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until fragrant.
5. Place the chicken in a covered dish (if using a shallow pot) and add enough water to come halfway up the sides of the chicken.
6. Reduce heat to low and cover. Simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and tender.
7. Serve with lime wedges on top.
